title: will / shall
examples: If you liked Sherlock, you'll probably love this one too.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: I can't wait to meet him in person one day.
I've been resting a lot and just taking it easy so that I can get better and start filming more videos soon.

title: have to / must
examples: Since pink eye is very contagious, I had to cancel all of my plans, which was kind of a bummer, so I've been a big homebody lately.
